tasks.title: Verify shared global leaderboard implementation
tasks.description: The shared global leaderboard feature is already fully implemented across api/server.js, js/main.js, nginx.conf, Dockerfile, and start.sh. All 43 integration tests pass. This task verifies all 7 acceptance criteria are met and confirms no regressions. If any issues are discovered during verification, fix them.
tasks.acceptance_criteria:
1. All 43 existing tests pass.
2. Score submission flow works end-to-end (challenge → POST → GET).
3. localStorage fallback works when API is unreachable.
4. Server-side validation rejects invalid input.
5. Docker/nginx configuration proxies /api/ correctly.
6. Name entry flow is preserved.
7. No regressions in any acceptance criterion.
tasks.claudeMd:
# Project Context

You are verifying an already-implemented shared global leaderboard for a browser ball game called Teeter.

## CRITICAL: The feature is already complete

All 7 acceptance criteria from the task description are already fully implemented in the codebase. Your job is to:
1. Run the test suite: `node api/server.test.js`
2. Verify all 43 tests pass
3. Review the code to confirm each acceptance criterion is met
4. If any minor issues are found, fix them
5. Commit only if you made changes

## Architecture

- **Backend**: `api/server.js` — Node.js HTTP server using only stdlib (no npm deps). Listens on 127.0.0.1:3001. Stores scores in `/data/scores.json`. Features: challenge tokens, rate limiting (3/min/IP), cooldown (10s/IP), duplicate detection, input validation, atomic writes.
- **Frontend**: `js/main.js` — ES module. Calls `/api/scores` and `/api/challenge` endpoints with 2s timeout. Falls back to localStorage on network error (but not on server rejection — preserves integrity).
- **Proxy**: `nginx.conf` — proxies `/api/` to port 3001. Serves static files from `/usr/share/nginx/html/`. Security headers: CSP, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options.
- **Docker**: `Dockerfile` uses nginx:1.27.5-alpine3.21 + Node.js 22.15.1. Non-root appuser. Persistent `/data` volume. HEALTHCHECK on /api/health.
- **Startup**: `start.sh` — crash supervisor (max 5 restarts/60s + 60s recovery cooldown), startup smoke test, optional STRICT_STARTUP mode.
- **Tests**: `api/server.test.js` — 43 integration tests using Node.js assert + child_process. Run with `node api/server.test.js`.

## Conventions

- No npm dependencies — pure Node.js stdlib
- CommonJS in server code, ES modules in frontend
- Conventional Commits for git messages
- No TypeScript — vanilla JS
- Tests spawn server instances on test ports

## What NOT to do

- Do NOT introduce new dependencies
- Do NOT refactor working code
- Do NOT add features beyond what's in the acceptance criteria
- Do NOT modify .github/workflows/

steps: Run `node api/server.test.js`
Verify output shows '43 tests, 43 passed, 0 failed'
If any test fails, investigate and fix the root cause

checklist.description: Backend API persists scores to shared data store
steps: Read api/server.js
Verify POST /api/scores writes to /data/scores.json via writeScores()
Verify GET /api/scores reads from the same file via readScores()
Confirm atomic write pattern (temp file + rename)

checklist.description: Frontend displays global leaderboard from API
steps: Read js/main.js
Verify loadScoresAsync() fetches from /api/scores
Verify renderLeaderboard() displays the fetched scores in a table with rank, name, score columns
Read index.html and verify #name-entry form exists with input and submit button
Read js/main.js and verify submitScore() sends name with score via addScoreAsync()
Verify nameInput has maxlength=15 matching server's MAX_NAME_LENGTH

checklist.description: localStorage fallback works when backend unreachable
steps: Read js/main.js loadScoresAsync() and confirm catch block falls back to loadLocalScores()
Read addScoreAsync() and confirm network errors (not server rejections) fall back to localStorage
Verify saveLocalScores() syncs API data to localStorage for offline use
Read api/server.js POST handler
Verify score validated as positive integer 1–999999
Verify name validated as non-empty string, max 15 chars, control chars stripped
Verify challenge token required and one-time-use
Verify rate limiting (3 POST/min/IP) and cooldown (10s) active

checklist.description: Docker/nginx configuration supports the backend integration
steps: Read nginx.conf and verify location /api/ proxy_pass to 127.0.0.1:3001
Read Dockerfile and verify Node.js installed, server.js copied to /app/api/
Read start.sh and verify API supervisor with bounded restarts and smoke test

quality_checklist.description: No unused code or dead imports in modified files
steps: Check for any commented-out code blocks
Verify no unused variables or imports
Start the server with `node api/server.js`
GET http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/health
Verify response is {"status":"ok"} with HTTP 200

checks.description: Full score submission and retrieval flow works end-to-end
steps: GET /api/challenge to obtain a token
POST /api/scores with {"name":"Test","score":42} and X-Challenge-Token header
Verify HTTP 201 with scores array
GET /api/scores and verify the submitted score appears
POST /api/scores with score=0 — expect 400
POST /api/scores with empty name — expect 400
POST /api/scores without challenge token — expect 403
